ideation: This sequence shows anticipation and enjoyment of popcorn. The animation starts with both arms relaxed at the sides, then moves to cupping hands to receive popcorn, followed by bringing hands to the mouth for eating, and lastly, a relaxed pose again. The left arm remains more static for balance.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, waiting patiently
left arm stays still, right hand cups to catch kernels
bringing the popcorn feast towards the mouth
both arms relax, satisfied after the snack
